testcase.name: Root_Returns_200
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Root returns 200 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.000212s when I GET "/" ... Status.passed in 0.005997s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 4.721e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Slow_Endpoint_Completes_With_200
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Slow endpoint completes with 200 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.000128s when I GET "/slow" ... Status.passed in 2.003s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 0.0001087s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Forced_Error_Endpoint_Returns_500
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Forced error endpoint returns 500 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0002639s when I GET "/error" ... Status.passed in 0.002271s then the status code should be 500 ... Status.passed in 9.99e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Flaky_Endpoint_Returns_200_Or_500
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Flaky endpoint returns 200 or 500 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.000236s when I GET "/flaky" ... Status.passed in 0.001773s then the status code should be one of 200, 500 ... Status.passed in 7.606e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Chaos_Endpoint_Returns_200,_401,_Or_500
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Chaos endpoint returns 200, 401, or 500 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0001848s when I GET "/chaos" ... Status.passed in 0.001681s then the status code should be one of 200, 401, 500 ... Status.passed in 7.486e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Secure_Without_Token_Returns_401
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Secure without token returns 401 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0001781s when I GET "/secure" ... Status.passed in 0.001619s then the status code should be 401 ... Status.passed in 6.7e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Admin_Without_Token_Returns_401
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Admin without token returns 401 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.00019s when I GET "/admin" ... Status.passed in 0.001723s then the status code should be 401 ... Status.passed in 6.914e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Login_Returns_200_And_A_Token
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Login returns 200 and a token given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.000149s when I POST to "/login" with JSON ... Status.passed in 0.001713s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 6.008e-05s then the JSON field "token" should exist ... Status.passed in 6.39e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Secure_With_Bearer_Returns_200
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Secure with bearer returns 200 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0001559s given I am logged in as "alice" ... Status.passed in 0.001327s when I GET "/secure" as authenticated user ... Status.passed in 0.00152s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 5.889e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Admin_With_Bearer_Returns_200
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Admin with bearer returns 200 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0001538s given I am logged in as "bob" ... Status.passed in 0.001228s when I GET "/admin" as authenticated user ... Status.passed in 0.001299s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 6.509e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Submit_Accepts_Json_Payload
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Submit accepts JSON payload given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0001516s when I POST to "/submit" with JSON ... Status.passed in 0.001166s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 5.126e-05s then the JSON field "received" should be true ... Status.passed in 5.412e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Items_List_Is_Empty_Initially
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Items list is empty initially given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0001361s when I GET "/items" ... Status.passed in 0.001094s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 5.341e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Create_Item_Returns_200
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Create item returns 200 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0001323s when I POST to "/items" with JSON ... Status.passed in 0.001247s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 5.007e-05s then the JSON field "created" should be true ... Status.passed in 5.293e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Get_Created_Item_By_Id
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Get created item by id given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0001309s when I POST to "/items" with JSON ... Status.passed in 0.001066s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 6.032e-05s when I GET "/items/1" ... Status.passed in 0.001143s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 5.412e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Delete_Item_Returns_200
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Delete item returns 200 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0001268s when I POST to "/items" with JSON ... Status.passed in 0.001219s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 5.102e-05s when I DELETE "/items/1" ... Status.passed in 0.001074s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 4.888e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Deleted_Item_Returns_404
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Deleted item returns 404 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.000128s when I POST to "/items" with JSON ... Status.passed in 0.0009601s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 4.983e-05s when I DELETE "/items/1" ... Status.passed in 0.0008659s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 4.601e-05s when I GET "/items/1" ... Status.passed in 0.0009179s then the status code should be 404 ... Status.passed in 5.293e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
